children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Paragraphs (4) and (8) of subsection (a), and subsection (b), of , sections 1805, 1808, 1811, 1812 and 1813 of this title, subchapters II and III of this chapter, and title II shall not apply to this subchapter.section 1801 of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Indian self-determination and education assistance
children.label: b Indian self-determination and education assistance
children.text: Funds made available pursuant to this subchapter shall be subject to the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ( et seq.).25 U.S.C. 4501

children.heading: Election to receive
children.label: c Election to receive
children.text: A tribally controlled postsecondary career and technical institution selected for a fiscal year under may elect to receive funds pursuant to in accordance with an agreement between the tribally controlled postsecondary career and technical institution and the Secretary under the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act ( et seq.) if the agreement is in existence on .section 1862(b) of this titlesection 1862 of this title25 U.S.C. 4501August 14, 2008
any program under the Higher Education Act of 1965 ( et seq.);20 U.S.C. 1001
any program under the Carl D. Perkins Career and Technical Education Act of 2006 [ et seq.]; or20 U.S.C. 2301
